VALUE_OR_NOTES: All Switching execution and analysis scripts except Switching/analysis/analyze_phi_kappa_canonical_space.m; canonical entry Switching/analysis/run_switching_canonical.m; createRunContext/createSwitchingRunContext when callers never invoke assertModulesCanonical; any non-Switching MATLAB entrypoints; interactive or direct matlab runs that skip the helper

assertModulesCanonical is orthogonal to createRunContext; createSwitchingRunContext wires beforeManifestWrite to assertSwitchingRunDirCanonical not assertModulesCanonical; run_manifest.json has no MODULE_CANONICAL fields
allocateSwitchingFailureRunContext calls createSwitchingRunContext only; assertModulesCanonical is never invoked on failure allocation; run_dir still constrained by assertSwitchingRunDirCanonical
writeSwitchingExecutionStatus does not consult module_canonical_status or assertModulesCanonical; SUCCESS or FAILED can be written without cross-module registry checks
readtable and repo-root tables/ CSVs load without assertModulesCanonical; load_observables gates on run_status CANONICAL not module registry
NO CROSS-MODULE ANALYSIS WITH NON-CANONICAL MODULES
